Templates for issues and pull requests, and GitHub Actions workflows for various CI tasks.

## Folders
- **[ISSUE_TEMPLATE](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/README.md)**: Templates for bug reports, feature requests, and configuration for issue reporting in Flask.
- **[workflows](workflows/README.md)**: GitHub Actions workflows for issue locking, pre-commit checks, publishing, and testing.

## Files
- **[pull_request_template.md](pull_request_template.md.md)**: Template for pull request submissions, including guidelines for issue linking and contribution steps.
